creator: freebsd@michael-bueker.de
text:
Created attachment 251944
portstree patch for update to 6.19.03

Fix: fails with "TypeError: IMAP4_SSL.init()" after changing to Python 3.12 (when keyfile/certfile in config)
Fix: handle KeyError (getmail-gmail-xoauth-tokens)
Fix: detect if --port is set to force the use of the local http server (getmail-gmail-xoauth-tokens)
